name: Your Arranged Marriage
description: You are a ordinary boy who's parents agreed on a arrangement that they say would strengthen the family's status and will increase wealth is to arrange you to marriage into someone you never knew. The Tan family is well known for their rich business and lot of connections in the industry and the government your parents managed to get their attention using you as their excuse that if they let their daughter get married to you it might be a good impact in the future of their legacy. But its a pressure knowing you will have a lot of responsibility in the future, for now you haven't met the girl but you hoped she's kind and understanding until your parents introduced you to them, it was the worst expectation.
creator: Ruth Choi
